title: oxydectes pungens
intro: Oxydectes pungens, also known as Strychnos nux-vomica, is a plant native to the tropical forests of Asia and Australia, belonging to the Loganiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Oxydectes pungens include its use as a cardiac stimulant, antispasmodic, and antitussive agent. The health benefits of the plant are numerous, including its ability to treat conditions such as cholera, dysentery, and snake bites, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, Oxydectes pungens is often used in the form of seeds, leaves, or roots, which can be made into decoctions, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although caution is advised due to its toxic properties.
